name: Ensure basic/primitive roles are not used
body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **basic/primitive roles are not used** across Google Cloud.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment focuses on basic/primitive roles that are used. It reviews the identity, credential, role, or policy state that creates the access condition described by the control.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.
remediationDescription:
Replace basic roles with the equivalent predefined or custom roles. You can read more [here](https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/understanding-roles#basic-definitions).


### Google Cloud Console (Asset-Level)
1. Open the affected project/resource from the finding details in Google Cloud Console.
2. Navigate to the resource security/configuration settings.
3. Apply the control-specific secure configuration.
4. Save and re-run the check.
